message:
test: add core-level swarm stress tests for 200-pane workloads (ft-1memj.30)

21 tests across 6 modules: multi-pane scrollback scale (hot/warm/cold
eviction at 200 panes), throughput (100K lines/s, batch vs individual),
eviction under pressure, backpressure integration (tier classification,
pause/resume 200 panes, escalation+eviction cycles), telemetry
aggregation, and config edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
